name: FilePond (Silky Smooth File Upload Widget)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); PQINA; plugins MIT too

auth.notes: Client-side upload widget; auth is your backend's concern

performance.notes: Client-side only; chunked upload plugin for large files

agent_readiness.notes: Smooth animated file upload component with rich UX. Drag-drop, paste from clipboard. Plugins: Image Preview, Image Crop, Image Transform (resize/compress client-side), File Validate Type, File Validate Size, File Encode (base64). React/Vue/Angular/Svelte adapters. Server-side processing API (upload endpoint config). Chunked upload plugin for large files. Unlike Uppy, FilePond is a single cohesive widget (not plugin system for UI). Accessible (ARIA). Delightful animations distinguish it from react-dropzone.

gotchas: Image transformation (resize/crop) plugins do client-side processing (validate server-side too)
Opinionated UI — customization via CSS variables
More UI than react-dropzone but less source flexibility than Uppy
Server must implement specific FilePond processing protocol
best_when: Projects wanting polished animated file upload UX out of the box
Image upload with client-side preview, crop, and resize
React/Vue/Angular apps needing a beautiful drop zone widget
Middle ground between react-dropzone (too bare) and Uppy (too complex)
avoid_when: Need upload from Google Drive/Dropbox sources (use Uppy)
summary: FilePond is a beautiful animated file upload widget with rich plugins. Drag-drop, paste, image preview/crop/resize client-side, accessibility. React/Vue/Angular/Svelte adapters. Middle ground: more polish than react-dropzone, less complexity than Uppy. Chunked upload for large files. Client-side image transform before upload. Best when you want a polished upload UI without Uppy's plugin system complexity.
